sections.heading: MSI Calculator – Power Supply, Wattage & PC Build Calculator
sections.content: An MSI calculator helps you estimate your PC's power consumption, PSU wattage requirements, and component compatibility. It analyzes CPU, GPU, RAM, storage, and other hardware to calculate total wattage and recommend the ideal power supply.

sections.heading: How to Use This Calculator
sections.content: Enter your values in the calculator above and click calculate to see instant results. Adjust inputs to compare scenarios and find the option that fits your needs.

faq.question: What does the MSI Calculator – Power Supply, Wattage & PC Build Calculator do?
faq.answer: An MSI calculator helps you estimate your PC's power consumption, PSU wattage requirements, and component compatibility. It analyzes CPU, GPU, RAM, storage, and other hardware to calculate total wattage and recommend the ideal power supply.

faq.question: Is this calculator free to use?
faq.answer: Yes. Smart Calculator tools are free, work in your browser, and require no signup.
